## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with the main branch.
- [ ] Any new or modified Python examples pass `pytest tests/`.
- [ ] Any new or modified notebooks have been stripped of output (`nbstripout`).
- [ ] New Python code follows the project style (`ruff` passes with no errors).
- [ ] New or modified markdown passes `markdownlint-cli2`.
- [ ] Documentation changes have been tested locally with `mkdocs serve`.
- [ ] Docstrings follow the [NumPy style](../.agents/skills/numpy-docstring-format/SKILL.md).
